channel.title: cs.AI updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: Computer Science -- Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI) updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive

item.title: A brand new result on transformers. (arXiv:2507.01111v1 [cs.AI])
item.description: We present a new result about attention heads.
item.dc:creator: Alice Researcher, Bob Scientist

item.title: Improved bounds for online learning. (arXiv:2507.01222v2 [cs.LG] UPDATED)
item.description: A revised version with tighter regret bounds.
item.dc:creator: Carol Theorist

item.title: An UPDATED Benchmark for Reasoning. (arXiv:2507.02222v1 [cs.AI])
item.description: A benchmark whose name literally contains the word UPDATED.
item.dc:creator: Dan Bencher

item.title: Older technique revisited. (arXiv:2506.09999v3 UPDATED)
item.description: Replacement announcement with no category bracket in the suffix.
item.dc:creator: Erin Revisor
